summary: Warren Beck from Blackridge, a financial services firm, contacted Aegis support to request a custom compliance template feature in Aegis Comply v2 that would allow them to track internal board and regulator controls alongside standard frameworks like SOC 2 and PCI DSS. Priya Patel confirmed the feature is on the near-term product roadmap and enrolled Warren in the early access/design partner program. In the meantime, Priya walked Warren through two workarounds: custom control annotations within existing reports and the Comply v2 API for exporting structured control data. The call concluded with clear next steps and a very positive tone from both parties.
actionItems: Priya Patel: Log feature request for custom compliance templates against Warren's account and flag as priority to the product team
Priya Patel: Send follow-up email within the hour with early access intake form and links to Comply v2 API documentation
Warren Beck: Complete the early access intake form and explore the custom annotation feature in the SOC 2 report UI
Warren Beck: Loop in internal data team to evaluate the Comply v2 API for pulling control data into internal dashboards

keyMoments.text: Warren praises Comply v2 on-demand reporting, saying his audit team is 'over the moon' about SOC 2 and PCI DSS reports
keyMoments.speaker: Warren Beck

keyMoments.text: Warren requests a bespoke custom compliance template feature to track Blackridge-specific internal controls for board reporting
keyMoments.speaker: Warren Beck

keyMoments.text: Priya offers enrollment in the customer advisory early access program, positioning Warren as a design partner to shape and receive the feature before GA
keyMoments.speaker: Priya Patel

keyMoments.text: Priya surfaces the undiscovered custom annotation feature within existing reports as an immediate workaround, which Warren plans to explore that afternoon
keyMoments.speaker: Priya Patel
